originalTitle: Kidnapping of foreigners soars in Africa's lawless Sahel region
title: Kidnapping of foreigners soars in Africa's lawless Sahel region
content: Growing insecurity in the Sahel made 2025 one of the worst years on record for the abduction of foreigners in Africa.

originalTitle: At least 55 Ghanaians killed in Russia-Ukraine war, minister says
title: At least 55 Ghanaians killed in Russia-Ukraine war, minister says
content: This is the highest number of confirmed casualties from a single African country in the Ukraine-Russia war.

originalTitle: South Africa beat Zimbabwe to set up NZ semi-final
title: South Africa beat Zimbabwe to set up NZ semi-final
content: South Africa produce an unconvincing performance with the bat as they beat Zimbabwe by five wickets to set up a semi-final against New Zealand

originalTitle: Why killing Khamenei isn’t the death of Iran’s Islamic Republic
title: Why killing Khamenei isn’t the death of Iran’s Islamic Republic
content: US officials have celebrated the killing of Iran’s Supreme Leader as the end of the Islamic Republic.

originalTitle: Three US fighter jets ‘mistakenly’ shot down over Kuwait
title: Three US fighter jets ‘mistakenly’ shot down over Kuwait
content: CENTCOM says three fighter jets 'mistakenly shot down'. Kuwait investigating cause of incident.

originalTitle: What is Iran’s military strategy? How has it changed since June 2025 war?
title: What is Iran’s military strategy? How has it changed since June 2025 war?
content: Defence analysts tell Al Jazeera that Iran has revised its military strategy since 12-day war with Israel.

originalTitle: Allies of US in the Gulf bear brunt of Iran attacks
title: Allies of US in the Gulf bear brunt of Iran attacks
content: Iran's attacks on Gulf Arab states suggest the Islamic Republic is targeting not just the US military but also civilian infrastructure.

title: Oil and gas prices jump as conflict escalates
content: Experts have warned that a prolonged conflict could push global energy prices even higher.

originalTitle: Set-pieces mean Premier League no longer a joy - Slot
title: Set-pieces mean Premier League no longer a joy - Slot
content: Liverpool manager Arne Slot says his "football heart doesn't like" the reliance on set-pieces in this season's Premier League.

originalTitle: Leeds say boos during Ramadan pause 'disappointing'
title: Leeds say boos during Ramadan pause 'disappointing'
content: Leeds United say loud boos during a brief pause in play to allow players observing Ramadan to break their fast in Saturday's Premier League game at Elland Road were "disappointing".

originalTitle: Premier League deletes Vicario social media post
title: Premier League deletes Vicario social media post
content: The Premier League deletes a social media post which appears to mock Tottenham goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario following a complaint by the club.
